privacy.title: Privacy & Terms
privacy.intro: NextSpot is a prototype built for the 2026 Tourism Data Utilization Contest. Below is how it handles your data and its terms of use during the demo.
privacy.collectBody: We only collect what you enter or choose while using the service — taste settings, saved places, congestion reports and feedback. You can use it anonymously with no sign-up.
privacy.storageBody: Your language, display name, tastes and saved list stay in your device’s local storage. Only data needed to run the service, such as congestion reports and inquiries, is stored in Supabase.
privacy.thirdPartyBody: We never sell your information to third parties or share it for advertising. You may be linked to external services such as Kakao Map for maps and directions.
privacy.termsBody: This service is a contest demo prototype. Congestion, wait times and recommendations are for reference only and accuracy is not guaranteed. We accept no legal liability for outcomes of using the service.
privacy.contactBody: For questions about your data or its deletion, please reach out through Support on the My page.
privacy.footer: Last updated · 2026 Tourism Data Utilization Contest edition

course.title: A custom route that dodges the crowds
course.desc: We chain 2–3 stops so you avoid the crowding predicted for when you arrive at each. An honest plan that factors in travel and dwell time.
course.fetchError: Couldn’t reach the recommendation server. Please try again shortly.
course.emptyBody: Not enough matching places nearby. Widen the type filter or try again later.
course.authBody: Pick a place you like on the map and we’ll build a dispersal route that dodges the crowds.

course.subline: We calculated arrival times to help you dodge the crowds.

recommend.onboardingBody: To match NextSpot AI’s optimized SPOT alternative routes, pick **3 or more** place types you’re interested in.
recommend.nlLabel: Tell or type your preferences in your own words (AI analyzes them)
recommend.nlPlaceholder: e.g. I like quiet hanok cafes and nearby barrier-free attractions

lab.title: My Lab
lab.cardDesc: Tune recommendations to your taste. Your feedback makes NextSpot smarter and saves you more time on your next trip.
lab.emptyDesc: When you decline a recommendation, you can tell us why here.
lab.answered: Thanks for letting us know. We’ll use this next time 🎯
lab.loadError: Couldn’t load your recommendation records. Please try again shortly.
lab.hint: You can tell us why later in My Lab
